title: senecio gayanus
intro: Senecio gayanus, also known as the "Ragwort", is a perennial plant native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio gayanus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Senecio gayanus include infusions, teas, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and support overall well-being.
